title: stanleya viridiflora
intro: Stanleya viridiflora, also known as prickly phacelia, is a perennial plant native to North America, characterized by its tall, green stems and clusters of small yellow flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Stanleya viridiflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
